sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] >= 8 and n['color'] not in ['B', 'c', 'g', 'G']:
        b = n['boundary']
        row_center = sum([p[0] for p in b]) / len(b)
        col_center = sum([p[1] for p in b]) / len(b)
        print(f"  color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, row~{row_center:.1f}, col~{col_center:.1f}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
